suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a UI convention for chain context reads: when using the searchable chain control, never read chain ID from #chainId.value; always use getCurrentChainId() (or dataset.chainId) for chain-dependent logic.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 fix review confirmed this pattern resolved a prior blocker and was applied broadly in src/server.ts, but mission AGENTS.md still does not state this rule.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an accessibility requirement that newly introduced custom dropdown/autocomplete widgets include combobox/listbox ARIA roles and state attributes (aria-expanded, aria-controls, role=option, aria-activedescendant management).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-2 reviews confirmed ARIA semantics are now implemented and preserved in chain dropdown follow-up work, but mission AGENTS.md still does not codify the requirement.

rejectedObservations.observation: worker-transcripts.jsonl recorded 0 tool calls for ui-chain-dropdown-ux-polish session despite substantial handoff evidence.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected as ambiguous and not yet proven systemic; single-session telemetry inconsistency is insufficient to justify immediate shared-state guidance updates.
